query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "opencomputer: verifiable software worlds for computer-use agents" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it directly extends the "computer-use agents" domain by applying the same mechanism (LLM-powered GUI agents) to a specialized vertical (3D building modeling/BIM), providing essential prior work on the capabilities and limitations of agents in complex software environments.
